report_name: New 'Friends' Ransomware Strain Uses Double-Extortion Strategy

attack_patterns.name: Exfiltration Over C2 Channel
attack_patterns.description: The Friends ransomware attackers exfiltrate valuable corporate and personal data before encryption to use as leverage in their double-extortion strategy.

attack_patterns.name: Data Encrypted for Impact
attack_patterns.description: The Friends ransomware encrypts files on the compromised network, appending the .friends124 extension to disrupt business operations and render data inaccessible.

attack_patterns.name: Inhibit System Recovery
attack_patterns.description: The Friends ransomware operators use vssadmin.exe to delete volume shadow copies, preventing easy recovery of encrypted files.

malware.name: Friends
malware.description: A new ransomware family that employs a double-extortion strategy. It encrypts files, appends the '.friends124' extension, exfiltrates data, and drops an HTML ransom note named 'RANSOM_NOTE.html'.

tools.name: vssadmin
tools.description: Used by the Friends ransomware operators to delete volume shadow copies with the command 'vssadmin.exe delete shadows /all /quiet' to inhibit system recovery.

identities.name: CYFIRMA
identities.description: The cybersecurity firm that discovered and analyzed the 'Friends' ransomware.

indicators.name: Friends Ransomware Note Detection
indicators.x_netsecio_sigma_rule:
title: Friends Ransomware Note Creation
id: 2b8c9d0e-1f2a-4b3c-8d4e-5f6a7b8c9d0e
status: experimental
description: Detects the creation of the 'Friends' ransomware note 'RANSOM_NOTE.html'.
references:
  - https://www.cyfirma.com/news/weekly-intelligence-report-03-jul-2026/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-07-03
tags:
  - attack.t1486
level: high
logsource:
  category: file_event
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    TargetFilename|endswith: '\RANSOM_NOTE.html'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the creation of the HTML ransom note file dropped by the Friends ransomware.

indicators.name: Friends Ransomware Encrypted File Detection
indicators.pattern:
title: Friends Ransomware Encrypted File Detection
id: 9e8f7a6b-5c4d-4e3f-8a2b-1c0d9e8f7a6b
status: experimental
description: Detects files encrypted by Friends ransomware, which appends the '.friends124' extension.
references:
  - https://www.cyfirma.com/news/weekly-intelligence-report-03-jul-2026/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-07-03
tags:
  - attack.t1486
level: high
logsource:
  category: file_event
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    TargetFilename|endswith: '.friends124'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects files that have been encrypted by the Friends ransomware, identified by the '.friends124' file extension.

indicators.name: Friends Ransomware VSS Deletion Command
indicators.pattern:
title: Friends Ransomware Volume Shadow Copy Deletion
id: 1a0b9c8d-7e6f-4a5b-9c8d-7e6f5a4b3c2d
status: experimental
description: Detects the command used by Friends ransomware to delete volume shadow copies and inhibit system recovery.
references:
  - https://www.cyfirma.com/news/weekly-intelligence-report-03-jul-2026/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-07-03
tags:
  - attack.t1490
level: high
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: '\vssadmin.exe'
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'delete'
      - 'shadows'
      - '/all'
      - '/quiet'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the execution of vssadmin.exe to delete all volume shadow copies, a common ransomware technique to prevent recovery.
